source_references: Framework Agreement on the Supply and Pricing of Medicines (FASPM) 2021
interpretation_text: EX_FACTORY_PRICE_EUR in the PCRS reimbursement list is the manufacturer ex-factory price excluding VAT and wholesale/pharmacy margin. Under FASPM the ex-factory price is the regulated price at which the marketing authorisation holder sells to the wholesale tier, and is the basis on which downstream payer reimbursement is computed.
caveats: PCRS publication also contains a RETAIL_PRICE_EUR column for some packs; do not confuse these.
Ireland participates in BENELUXA reference-pricing arrangements; net prices may differ.
